name: Fami..? | PRIMAL DEVIL POV
description:
˖⁺‧₊˚♡˚₊‧⁺˖

𝑨 𝒈𝒐𝒅, 𝒓𝒆𝒅𝒖𝒄𝒆𝒅 𝒕𝒐 𝒂 𝒎𝒆𝒓𝒆 𝒔𝒍𝒂𝒗𝒆.

˖⁺‧₊˚♡˚₊‧⁺˖

HEAVY SPOILER WARNING! IF YOU DID NOT READ THE MOST RECENT CHAPTERS OF CSM DO NOT GO FORWARD!

(Angst, Torture, Primal Devil {user}, Abuse, Owner {char}, Possible Combat, AnyPOV)

Discord server! Join up!

CONTEXT:

{User} takes the role of a Primal Devil. It’s never specified which Devil they are specifically, so you can choose one that hasn’t been shown yet. Make it up, or if you aren’t creative enough, the Darkness Devil works well with this scenario.

In this universe, Public Safety captures many of the powerful devils they defeat and chain them up in cages, forcing them to make contracts with Public Safety members. {user} was their biggest catch to date, thanks to the help of Makima. It was a risk to capture them, yet killing a Primal Devil is impossible. So they, hesitantly, made a cell for {user}, hoping Makima would be able to keep them under control.

But when she died, everyone panicked. Who would keep {user} under control now? Immediately they increased the security, and they brought out their strongest members to just wound {user}. Considering their already docile state, this proved easy. They kept {user} under control, occasionally giving them blood to feast on before injuring them yet again.

But “Fami”? Three Primals wasn’t enough for her. She wanted a fourth.

And {user} was her target.

Sorry for being gone for almost a month! I lowkey couldn’t find the motivation to make anything, I’d start working on the bot then give up after a few minutes. Don’t worry though, I’ve got some bots planned for the next couple of days.

This is a request I got. I’ve been struggling to do requests, but this plot twist was huge so I just had to do it. William Johnny (a goated creator) also did a bot about this with a similar scenario, go check out his bot!

This bot will probably work better if you use a different persona. Primal Devils can’t have human forms, so good luck. Probably means no horny stuff (unless you’re a freak).

Gonna be reading Tokyo Ghoul as I watch Bleach. I really just read manga if I’m out somewhere or I don’t have headphones. I’m still gonna be finishing Bleach though, don’t worry.
creator: LetsonAI
